ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "energy_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., battery electric vehicle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "energy_source_type" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., vehicle, power plant) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for production (e.g., kWh, liters) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production_data" (
  "energy_production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy production data entry */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is recorded */,
  "max_fraction_of_production" REAL /* Maximum fraction of production for the energy source in the given year */,
  "production_value" REAL /* Actual production value */,
  "source_of_data" TEXT /* Source of the production data */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_data_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which data is recorded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_models" (
  "data_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data model */,
  "data_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the data model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the data model */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the data model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the creation date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the forecast is made */,
  "forecasted_production" REAL /* Forecasted production value for the energy source in the given year */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for forecasting */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the creation date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import entry */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the data is imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_source" TEXT /* Source of the data import (e.g., file, API) */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the data import (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "data_format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "is_supported" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data format is currently supported */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_import_formats" (
  "data_import_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import format entry */,
  "data_import_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data import entry */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data format used */,
  "import_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the data import format */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_import_format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_import_formats_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("data_format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_import_formats_data_import_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_import_id") REFERENCES data_imports ("data_import_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production_trends" (
  "energy_production_trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy production trend entry */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the trend is recorded */,
  "production_trend" REAL /* Production trend value for the energy source in the given year */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., growth, decline) */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_production_trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_trends_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_trends_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_source_categories" (
  "energy_source_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source category */,
  "energy_source_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source category (e.g., renewable, non-renewable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_source_category_mappings" (
  "energy_source_category_mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source category mapping entry */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "energy_source_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source category */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_source_category_mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_source_category_mappings_energy_source_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_category_id") REFERENCES energy_source_categories ("energy_source_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_source_category_mappings_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("energy_source_id")
)
